info.title: Scrape Creators API
info.description: The easiest way to scrape public social media data at scale. Extract profiles, posts, videos, comments, and more from TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook, Reddit, and 15+ platforms.

parameters.name: company
parameters.description: The company name to search for. 'Microsoft' for example

parameters.name: companyId
parameters.description: The company id to search for

parameters.name: countries
parameters.description: Comma separated list of countries. Example: US,CA,MX

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date to search for. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date to search for. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

parameters.name: paginationToken
parameters.description: Pagination token to paginate through results
